Bash(curl -s "https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts" -H "Authorization: Bearer pb_live_5BWVmpMWuqi9PrqYvmZUUS" -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
posts = d.get\('data', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d
for p in \(posts if isinstance\(posts, list\) else [posts]\)[:10]:
    accs = p.get\('social_accounts', []\)
    print\(f'{p[\\"status\\"]:12} | {p[\\"scheduled_at\\"]:25} | slides: {len\(p.get\(\\"media\\",[]\)\)} | accs: {accs} | id: {p[\\"id\\"][:12]}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/post-results" -H "Authorization: Bearer pb_live_5BWVmpMWuqi9PrqYvmZUUS" -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
results = d.get\('data', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d
for r in \(results if isinstance\(results, list\) else [results]\)[:5]:
    print\(json.dumps\(r, indent=2\)\)
    print\('---'\)
" 2>/dev/null | head -60)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.post-bridge.com/v1/posts?limit=50" -H "Authorization: Bearer pb_live_5BWVmpMWuqi9PrqYvmZUUS" -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
posts = d.get\('data', []\)
# Show darkromancereaderss posts \(account 54796\)
for p in posts:
    if 54796 in p.get\('social_accounts', []\):

import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
posts = d.get\('data', []\)
good_cutoff = '2026-04-14T16:48'
cancel_ids = []
keep_ids = []
for p in posts:
    if p['status'] != 'scheduled':
        continue
    created = p['created_at']
    is_good = created >= good_cutoff
    if is_good:
        keep_ids.append\(p['id']\)
        tag = 'KEEP'
    else:
        cancel_ids.append\(p['id']\)
        tag = 'CANCEL'
    accs = p.get\('social_accounts', []\)
    print\(f'{tag:6} | created: {created[:19]} | sched: {str\(p.get\("scheduled_at","now"\)\)[:19]} | slides: {len\(p.get\("media",[]\)\)} | accs: {accs} | {p["id"][:12]}'\)
print\(f'\\nTo cancel: {len\(cancel_ids\)}, To keep: {len\(keep_ids\)}'\)
# Output cancel IDs for next step
with open\('/tmp/cancel_ids.txt', 'w'\) as f:
    for pid in cancel_ids:
        f.write\(pid + '\\n'\)
PYEOF)
